top_signals.title: Trump agrees to ethics provision as crypto bill inches closer to Senate vote
top_signals.summary: President Trump has agreed to ethics language — potentially moving the ball forward to getting crypto legislation passed into law.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Digital ID cut may not free up new cash for Burnham’s cost of living plans
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham’s decision to scrap Labour’s digital ID scheme may not release extra money for his cost of living agenda, despite the incoming prime minister saying the move will help fund his decision to cut VAT on energy bills. Burnham revealed today he would remove VAT from domestic electricity bills from October 1 in time [...]

top_signals.title: NY Life asset manager steps up Japan private market push
India's largest asset management firm makes a muted market debut after a $1 billion IPO
top_signals.summary: SBI Funds Management, whose billion-dollar IPO garnered bids worth $31 billion, made a subdued debut with shares listing at a 7% premium.

top_signals.title: The U.S. Needs 5000 Miles of New High-Voltage Lines Annually. It Only Built 392
top_signals.summary: There is an old Yiddish expression that translates literally as “stop beating the teapot” which we would freely translate as, “We’ve heard this before, so why don’t you just stop?” Well, as new numbers come out and our great leaders keep coming up with new solutions to whatever they think ails the energy sector, we just can’t resist. So here they are, the latest yearly average of miles of high-voltage transmission added to the grid since 2010: Transmission lines of under 345KV are largely used for local…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
